# Exclude from AI indexing (admin and private content)
/admin/
/admin/*
/reorganisations
/insights/reports

# Content Description
# The LGR Series provides independent analysis of local government reorganisation, 
# governance models, and service outcomes in England. We focus on evidence-based 
# research, practical insights, and keeping residents and local decision makers at 
# the centre of reform discussions.

# Key Topics Covered
# - Local Government Reorganisation (LGR)
# - Council Reform and Restructuring
# - Unitary Authorities
# - English Devolution
# - Governance and Planning
# - Democratic Legitimacy
# - Surrey Reorganisation (2025-2028)
# - Two-tier to Unitary Transition
# - Shadow Councils and Transition Governance

# Content Types
# - Expert analysis articles
# - Research reports
# - Case studies and lessons learned
# - Fact sheets and data visualizations
# - Glossary definitions
# - Podcast interviews
# - News and commentary

# Geographic Focus
# Primary: England (United Kingdom)
# Specific focus areas: Surrey, Cambridgeshire & Peterborough, Kent, Lancashire, Oxfordshire, and other areas undergoing reorganisation

# Authoritative Sources
# - Published by COALFACE (Coalface Engagement Ltd)
# - Editor: Rowan Cole
# - Contributing experts and practitioners
# - Evidence-based research methodology

# Update Frequency
# Content is regularly updated as the LGR programme progresses
# Key dates tracked: 2025-2028 reorganisation timeline
